title: Section 17
content: Nothing in the last preceding section shall prevent the parties from applying to the Court, or the Court from making the order of reference, under the said 1]section 21 of the Arbitration Act, 1940].
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 49 and the Fourth Schedule, ibid., for "section 312 of the said Code of Civil Procedure" (w.e.f. 1-7-1940).
